weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 20 total findings across 13 unique CVEs, with no single vulnerability dominating the landscape as each of the 10 most frequently seen CVEs, including CVE-2026-6973, CVE-2026-43575, and CVE-2026-35527, was observed only once. The active security domains spanned multiple areas, including Cloud and IAM, Containers and K8s, and OS and Kernel, among others. The most active day was 2026-05-07, indicating a recent surge in security-related activity that warrants continued monitoring and analysis to ensure the organization's security posture remains robust.
